item: Residual missingness in some WDI indicators and EM-DAT loss fields.
Simple trend model for 2024 GHG may miss non-linear policy/economic shifts.
Stress multipliers are scenario assumptions and should be calibrated with richer exposure data.
Adopt a fixed high-completeness indicator basket with quarterly QA checks.
Integrate asset-level exposure maps for country-peril underwriting decisions.
Run scenario ensembles and map outputs to pricing and reinsurance decisions.
